text:
Athens Times

—

A woman who volunteered in Paris was found in her apartment, with the police arresting her partner as a suspect in the murder. An unpleasant news brings to light the French “leparisien” as according to her report, a young volunteer at the Olympic Games was found dead inside her apartment, the day after the Olympic Games ended in Paris. Specifically, the victim’s mother had reported the disappearance of her 21-year-old daughter, with the police following investigations tracking the unfortunate girl dead in her apartment. The body had haematoma on the left side of the head and a neck wound, with the body being transferred to the Paris Medical Institute, where it will undergo an autopsy-death in the following period. In fact, the authorities went on to arrest her partner, as he through a message told his relatives that he was doing something “foolish”. During his arrest the suspect was drunk and was in a coma. As the report states, he tried to end his life by taking drugs. As it makes sense after his arrest, this man will be called to an apology in order to give more details about the case. For now no more details have been given to the public than the brutal murder.

Athens Times

News about Greece and the World.
title: Volunteer for the Olympics Games found dead in her apartment, arrested as a suspect her partner - Athens Times
author: uploader
